title: Build a manual K-fold GBDT control model using the step-65/stop-debt features
summary: Create a minimal reproducible LightGBM or GBDT K-fold pipeline as a control against the fixed AutoGluon holdout wrapper.
body:
Evidence from artifacts:
- All successful scored nodes are AutoGluon.
- All 34 non-AutoGluon/manual nodes failed or produced no score.
- AutoGluon configuration was effectively constant across 790 nodes: medium-quality AG, XGB/GBM/CAT, time_limit=600, auto_stack=False, fit_weighted_ensemble=False, holdout validation.
- Modeling diversity has not been properly tested because manual attempts were unstable.

Why this might improve ROC AUC:
A controlled manual model can provide true K-fold OOF predictions, deterministic rank averaging, tuned early stopping, and full-train refits. This tests whether the feature family is stronger outside the fixed AutoGluon wrapper.

Concrete implementation plan:
- Applies to legacy/manual pipeline.
- Use compact step-65 features plus optional strict stop-debt block.
- Start with one LightGBM binary classifier using AUC metric.
- Use 5-fold GroupKFold by Race_Year where available.
- Add CatBoost or XGBoost only after the LightGBM control is reproducible.
- Rank-average test predictions across folds.
- Keep all preprocessing target-free unless fold-safe encodings are explicitly implemented.

Leakage and validation risks:
- Manual pipelines are easier to leak if preprocessing is not fold-contained.
- OOF target encodings must be fold-safe.
- Start minimal; uncontrolled rewrites have failed repeatedly.

Expected score impact:
- Impact: medium.
- Confidence: medium-low.
- Longer training/debugging budget likely needed.

Fast experiment design:
- Minimal change: one LightGBM model, 5 grouped folds, compact step-65 features only, no target encoding.
- Confirm if OOF AUC is competitive with step-65 holdout and fold variance is lower.
- Reject if manual model underperforms by more than about 0.0002 or is not reproducible.

Prompt snippet for AIDE coding agent:
Implement a minimal manual LightGBM 5-fold GroupKFold pipeline using the compact step-65 feature set, report OOF ROC AUC, train fold models, rank-average test predictions, and keep all preprocessing target-free.
